scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace packages/contracts --workspace packages/entities --workspace packages/utils --workspace packages/db
scripts.typecheck:packages: npm run typecheck --workspace packages/contracts --workspace packages/entities --workspace packages/utils --workspace packages/db
scripts.clean:packages: npm run clean --workspace packages/contracts --workspace packages/entities --workspace packages/utils --workspace packages/db
scripts.dev:backend: npm run build:packages && npm run dev --workspace apps/backend
scripts.dev:frontend: npm run build:packages && npm run dev --workspace apps/frontend
scripts.dev: npm run build:packages && concurrently "npm run dev --workspace apps/backend" "npm run dev --workspace apps/frontend"
scripts.build:backend: npm run build:packages && npm run build --workspace apps/backend
scripts.build:frontend: npm run build:packages && npm run build --workspace apps/frontend
scripts.typecheck:backend: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck --workspace apps/backend
scripts.typecheck:frontend: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck --workspace apps/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck:packages && npm run typecheck --workspace apps/backend && npm run typecheck --workspace apps/frontend
scripts.clean: rm -rf apps/backend/dist apps/frontend/.next apps/frontend/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo && npm run clean:packages
